parameters.url: ={{ (() => { let ctx = {}; try { ctx = $items('Build Query Context (Execute)')[0]?.json || {}; } catch (_) {} if (!ctx || !Object.keys(ctx).length) { try { ctx = $items('Build Query Context (Manual)')[0]?.json || {}; } catch (_) {} } return String(ctx.teamcity?.baseUrl || '') + '/app/rest/builds'; })() }}

parameters.name: locator
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { let ctx = {}; try { ctx = $items('Build Query Context (Execute)')[0]?.json || {}; } catch (_) {} if (!ctx || !Object.keys(ctx).length) { try { ctx = $items('Build Query Context (Manual)')[0]?.json || {}; } catch (_) {} } const bt = String(ctx.request?.buildTypeId || ''); return 'buildType:(id:' + bt + '),status:FAILURE,state:finished,count:1'; })() }}

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { let ctx = {}; try { ctx = $items('Build Query Context (Execute)')[0]?.json || {}; } catch (_) {} if (!ctx || !Object.keys(ctx).length) { try { ctx = $items('Build Query Context (Manual)')[0]?.json || {}; } catch (_) {} } return 'Bearer ' + String(ctx.teamcity?.token || ''); })() }}
